note: Empty-normalizing rendered text (field-found in v0.3.0): components whose only static text is punctuation ('|', '/', '-') normalize to empty, and an empty target is a substring of every query — turning the matcher into a universal wildcard. Gibberish must decline no-signal instead of matching the punctuation components; a real term must rank the real component top-1 with no punctuation noise; gibberish mixed into a real query must not poison it.
